title: Thillu Mullu Lyrics Gethu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Gethu Thillu Mullu Song Lyrics
Singers : Naresh Iyer, Ranina Reddy
Lyrics : V Padmavathy, Sirkali Sirpi, Gana Vinoth

Thillu Mullu pannala
ah gethu githu kaattala
scenu geenu podala
bulb gilbu vaangala

kannum kannum paakkala
naan onna vittu pogala
thottu kittu pesaala
nee thottaa
yaenu kekkala.

petti kadayila nikkala
vetti kadhayum pesala
dhammu gimmu adikkala
pinna yaendi enna
pudikkala.

azhgu ponnunga naattula
nandandhu pogudhu roattula
yedhayum naanum pakkala
adhu yeno unaku
puriyala.

firstu loveu neethaane
my baby
en justu neeyum
paakkalanaa
why baby.

best lover naanthaane
my baby
unna rest illaama
kadhalippen
naan baby

perty keerti pogala
aattam geettam podala
friendu gindunu suthtala
mabbula gibbula
kedakkala

keenja panta podala
adha iduppu keezha irakkala
ooraammoottu bikela
naan oora suththi parkala

unna partha jorula
yen appan pechum yerala
nerula pesa dhillila
yen kooda pesu cellula.

nee thaan eppavun nenjula
idha yaaru kittayum sollala
enaku neethaan anjala
naan idhukku mela kenjala

simple aana aalu naanu
my baby
ena single aaga iruka sonnaa
why baby

mr. cleanu naanthaaney
my baby
yen mrs aaga no solra
why baby

idhu thinga kezhama
sari illa nelama
naan sollapona
bakkungudhey
enna koduma.

nee pinji thimiru
un lovea avuru
adi aala kolla
peththu pottaa
unga mother-u

un azhaga ellaam
en olichu vechcha
naan rasikiradha
en thada vichichaa

hai yaiya ya ya ya ya
my baby
hai yaiya ya ya ya ya
why baby

Thillu Mullu pannala
ah gethu githu kaattala
scenu geenu podala
bulb gilbu vaangala

kannum kannum paakkala
naan onna vittu pogala
thottu kittu pesaala
nee thottaa
yaenu kekkala.

petti kadayila nikkala
vetti kadhayum pesala
dhammu gimmu adikkala
pinna yaendi enna
pudikkala.

azhgu ponnunga naattula
nandandhu pogudhu roattula
yedhayum naanum pakkala
adhu yeno unaku
puriyala.

firstu loveu neethaane
my baby
en justu neeyum
paakkalanaa
why baby.

best lover naanthaane
my baby
unna rest illaama
kadhalippen
naan baby

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Thillu Mullu conveys a playful and light-hearted vibe, focusing on fun interactions and carefree moments.

How does this song fit into the movie plot?

In Gethu, the song is a lively number that showcases the characters enjoying a festive atmosphere, enhancing the overall mood of the film.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Naresh Iyer and Ranina Reddy, with music composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

Thillu Mullu was released on December 31, 2015, marking the end of the year with a festive tune.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Thillu Mullu from the movie Gethu is a lively duet that encapsulates the joy of celebration and carefree moments. With its upbeat tempo and playful lyrics, it invites listeners to let loose and enjoy life. The vibrant collaboration between Naresh Iyer and Ranina Reddy adds to the song's charm, making it a perfect choice for parties and celebrations. Overall, it evokes feelings of happiness and energy, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thillu Mullu from Gethu is a vibrant and energetic duet that perfectly captures the essence of celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Naresh Iyer and Ranina Reddy, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious rhythm and playful lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: We can't do Thillu Mullu, but we can show the scene and bring in the fun.
I haven't looked into your eyes; I can't leave you. If you touch me and talk, why don't you ask me?
I'm standing in the shop, talking about the story. I can't hit the gimmick; then why don't you like me?
Beautiful girls are going around in the country. I can't see anything; you might not understand that.
You're my first love, my baby. If you look at me, why baby?
I'm the best lover, my baby. I love you without rest, baby.
The party won't go well; the dance and song won't happen. Friends are just wandering around.
Don't throw away the trash; it won't fall below. I won't look around the town.
When I see you, my dad talks about it. I can't talk to you on the phone.
You always keep this in your heart; no one can tell me. You're my angel; I can't handle this.
I'm a simple person, my baby. If I say I want to stay single, why baby?
I'm Mr. Clean, my baby. Why do you say no to being my Mrs.?
This isn't right; I told you it's wrong. What a punishment is this?
You hide your love; if they catch it, your mother will scold you.
I enjoy all your beauty; if I keep it, will I be in trouble?
Hey, my baby, hey, why baby?
We can't do Thillu Mullu, but we can show the scene and bring in the fun.
I haven't looked into your eyes; I can't leave you. If you touch me and talk, why don't you ask me?
I'm standing in the shop, talking about the story. I can't hit the gimmick; then why don't you like me?
Beautiful girls are going around in the country. I can't see anything; you might not understand that.
You're my first love, my baby. If you look at me, why baby?
I'm the best lover, my baby. I love you without rest, baby.
